name: Java 8 (New)
description: Evaluates candidate's knowledge and skill in programming with Java 8. Suitable for mid-level developers.

name: OPQ32r
description: Occupational Personality Questionnaire. Measures how personality impacts work performance and behavior, focusing on stakeholder interaction, teamwork, and leadership.

name: Verify G+ (Interactive)
description: A comprehensive measure of general cognitive ability including numerical, deductive, and inductive reasoning.

name: Verify Numerical Reasoning
description: Measures the ability to make correct decisions or inferences from numerical or statistical data.

name: Verify Verbal Reasoning
description: Measures the ability to evaluate the logic of various kinds of argument as presented in written form.

name: Motivation Questionnaire (MQ)
description: Explores the situations and conditions that drive an individual to perform at their best.

name: Python 3.x
description: Evaluates candidate's knowledge of Python 3.x, suitable for data scientists and backend engineers.

name: Dependability and Safety Instrument
description: Measures a candidate's potential for safe behavior and reliability in safety-critical roles.

name: Situational Judgment Test (SJT)
description: Assesses an individual's judgement and decision making in workplace scenarios.

name: Global Sales Assessment (GSA)
description: Measures the potential to succeed in different sales roles, evaluating behaviors like negotiation and relationship building.
